name: Cashew Chicken & Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown the nuts in vegetable oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat for about 3 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon.
2. Add onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until golden, about 8 minutes.
4. Stir in broccoli, 3/4 cup of broth, and soy sauce. Simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Dissolve cornstarch in remaining broth. Stir into the skillet.
6. Simmer over medium heat until thickened. Boil for an additional minute.
7. Return cashews to the skillet with salt and pepper.
